job_title: Senior Software Engineer - Bloomberg Finance & CFO
job_nlp_title: Senior Software Engineer - Bloomberg Finance & CFO
taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Full Stack Engineer
core_skills: Object-oriented programming, C#, Java, Software development lifecycle, Web services
skill_match_scores: Object-oriented programming:1.0, C#:0.0, Java:1.0, Software development lifecycle:1.0, Web services:1.0
must_have_quals: 4+ years experience programming and systems design utilizing object-oriented languages (e.g. C#, JAVA), A degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a similar field of study or equivalent work experience, Experience in all phases of the software development lifecycle, Experience creating and working with web and Windows services, Experience with relational databases design (e.g. SQL, PostgreSQL), Understanding of fundamental networking concepts (e.g. firewall, proxy traversal)
preferred_quals: Experience in full web-stack development (i.e. JavaScript, CSS, HTML), Significant experience with SQL syntax and stored procedure development, Experience programming in C# or Python, Experience of working within an IT organization, Comfortable working closely with users to understand and solve business problems
core_responsibilities: Create and enhance custom applications which eliminate inefficiencies or provide brilliant solutions to seemingly intractable problems, Build and maintain web/desktop applications, Office Add-Ins, and back-end system automation tools, Interact with numerous existing systems and their supporting teams to utilize Bloomberg infrastructure and tools resulting in bespoke solutions to solve complex business problems
job_summary: Bloomberg is a global leader in financial data and analytics, and they are seeking a Senior Software Engineer to join their Finance Development team. The role involves collaborating with business users to create and enhance custom applications that support Bloomberg's Finance community, focusing on web-based applications and system integrations.
